extracted.title: TE Customer Specific Operational Flow Order -- LIFTED EFF 1/21
extracted.description:
Effective 9:00 AM CCT January 21, 2026, Texas Eastern (TE) is lifting the previously posted Customer Specific Operational Flow Order effective January 14, 2026.

The previously posted Operational Flow Order for Market Area Zones M2-24, M2-30 and M3 remains in effect.

Please refer to the OFO table below for the effected TETCO zones, dates, and tolerance percentages.

OFO table summary:
- M1-24": No OFO (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- M1-30": No OFO (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- M2-24": OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 4%/250 (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- M2-30": OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 4%/250 (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- M3: OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 4%/250 (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- ETX: No OFO (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- STX: No OFO (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- WLA: No OFO (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- ELA: No OFO (Gas Day Jan 20; Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)
- Customer Specific: OFO in Effect: No Due Pipe 4%/250 (Gas Day Jan 20); No OFO (Gas Day Jan 21 and until further notice)

NOTE:
Deliveries No DP: Shippers are not to take more than scheduled
Deliveries No DS: Shippers are not to take less than scheduled
Receipts No DP: Shippers are not to give less than scheduled
Receipts No DS: Shippers are not to give more than scheduled

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
